text.title: Bun Runtime Setup
text.summary: Project initialization, package.json scripts, bunfig.toml, version pinning, and tsconfig requirements for Bun projects.

rule.statement: Pin the Bun version in package.json packageManager field and in CI (oven-sh/setup-bun@v2 with bun-version). Never use "latest".
rule.rationale: Reproducibility requires identical Bun versions across developer machines, CI, and production containers.

example.code: bun init bun add hono zod bun add -d @types/bun

rule.statement: Define dev, start, test, and build scripts in package.json. Use bun --watch for dev (full restart) not bun --hot (persists state).
rule.rationale: --hot keeps top-level singletons alive across reloads; edited config does not take effect until a full restart.

section.title: bunfig.toml

rule.statement: Set frozen-lockfile = true under [install] in bunfig.toml. Enable coverage under [test].
rule.rationale: Frozen lockfile in CI detects lockfile drift, identical to npm ci behavior.

section.reference: bunfig.toml with CI and test settings.

rule.statement: Set moduleResolution to "bundler" in tsconfig.json. This is required for Bun's native module resolution.
rule.rationale: Bun handles modern resolution natively; "bundler" mode enables Bun-specific path resolution without ts-node shims.
